task_statement: Customer release durable guard hardening. Widen the existing product_no_smith_residue checker so the surfaces that actually leaked in release pruning are covered: agent/skills and brick/templates/skills, in addition to the current README.md, support/docs/spec, agent/prompts, and support/onboarding/install.sh. Keep this as support checker evidence only: no source truth, no success/quality judgment, no Movement authority. Implement narrowly in support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py unless a profile text pin requires a minimal update. Required behavior: current clean tree still passes; a temporary FIRE probe with /Users/smith in agent/skills/brick-task-author/SKILL.md fires RED; a temporary FIRE probe with /Users/smith in brick/templates/skills/make-a-brick/SKILL.md fires RED; existing org and user-home probes still fire. Update the human-readable output/docstring so it names the widened skill surfaces. Run git diff --check, compileall for kernel_checks.py, the read-side-projection-boundary profile, and full check_profile.py --all if feasible. If a probe is blocked, report not_proven; do not fake it.

nodes.work_statement: Implement the narrow durable guard widening for product_no_smith_residue. Add agent/skills and brick/templates/skills to the scanned product surfaces. Add or update FIRE probes so /Users/smith inserted into those two skill surfaces is detected. Preserve existing README working-example allowance and existing org/user-home probes. Prefer changing only support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py. Run git diff --check, compileall, read_side_projection_boundary profile, and --all if feasible. Report exact commands and any not_proven. Do not edit actual skill docs or source product files.

Code-attack QA for product_no_smith_residue guard widening. Inspect the sandbox diff. Verify only allowed checker/profile/reference files changed; scan scope includes agent/skills and brick/templates/skills; FIRE probes cover both new surfaces; existing README org allowance is not broadened; git diff --check and relevant checker/profile commands are green or blockers are honest. Do not source-mutate.

Axis-attack QA for the release guard. Verify this is support checker evidence only; it does not make checker output source truth, success/quality judgment, Movement authority, route target selection, or customer comprehension proof. Confirm no customer skill/docs source files were edited. Do not source-mutate.

Closure synthesis. Read work + both QA returns. If the guard widening is implemented and checked, return forward evidence with changed files, commands, sandbox commit, proof limits, and not_proven. If any implementation_gap or boundary_mismatch remains, return transition_concern_evidence instead of closure.
